title: dolichos brevidentatus
intro: Dolichos brevidentatus, also known as the dwarf horse bean, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Dolichos brevidentatus include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
